attributes.description: Cost breakdown by SKU, deployment, and tier. Shows total billing, cost by component, and deployment cost comparison.

query.esql:
FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON @timestamp >= conf_start_date AND @timestamp <= conf_end_date
| EVAL total_chargeable_units_value = COALESCE(total_chargeable_units, total_ecu) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0), deployment = CONCAT(deployment_name, " (", LEFT(deployment_id, 6), ")")
| STATS `Normalised cost` = SUM(total_chargeable_units_value) BY @timestamp, deployment
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 5000

FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON @timestamp >= conf_start_date AND @timestamp <= conf_end_date
| EVAL total_chargeable_units_value = COALESCE(total_chargeable_units, total_ecu) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0), deployment = CONCAT(deployment_name, " (", LEFT(deployment_id, 6), ")")
| STATS `Normalised cost` = SUM(total_chargeable_units_value) BY @timestamp, deployment
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 5000

embeddableConfig.description: Full deployment bill: the sum of ALL billing SKUs (data tiers, ML, Kibana, snapshots, data transfer and on-prem nodes) converted at the configured rate. This is the highest-level total. Tier and data-stream panels show only the allocatable data-tier pool, so they sum to less than this figure.
embeddableConfig.title: Total Cloud Billing Over Time

attributes.description: Full billing spend per chargeback group over time. Each group is defined by the chargeback_group tag set on ESS deployments. All SKUs (data tiers, ML, Kibana, snapshots, transfer) contribute — the stack totals equal the full organisation bill. FinOps value: shows which teams or business units are growing their spend fastest.

query.esql:
FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON @timestamp >= conf_start_date AND @timestamp <= conf_end_date
| EVAL total_chargeable_units_value = COALESCE(total_chargeable_units, total_ecu) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0)
| STATS `Normalised cost` = SUM(total_chargeable_units_value) BY @timestamp, deployment_group
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 5000

| EVAL total_chargeable_units_value = COALESCE(total_chargeable_units, total_ecu) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0)

embeddableConfig.content:
## Deployment group statistics
**Source:** `billing_cluster_cost_lookup` — full invoice, all SKUs.

Cost is normalised using the configured chargeable-unit rate. Groups are derived from the `chargeback_group` tag on ESS deployments. Totals in this section match the full deployment bill shown above.

attributes.description: Total normalised spend per chargeback group for the selected period, ranked highest to lowest. Covers the full invoice — all SKU families included. FinOps value: the primary allocation table for internal chargeback — each group's figure is what you charge back to that team or cost centre.

query.esql:
FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| EVAL ts = @timestamp
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON ts >= conf_start_date AND ts <= conf_end_date
| STATS `Normalised cost` = SUM(COALESCE(total_chargeable_units, total_ecu) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0)) BY deployment_group | RENAME deployment_group AS `Deployment Group`
| SORT `Normalised cost` DESC

FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| EVAL ts = @timestamp
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON ts >= conf_start_date AND ts <= conf_end_date
| STATS `Normalised cost` = SUM(COALESCE(total_chargeable_units, total_ecu) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0)) BY deployment_group | RENAME deployment_group AS `Deployment Group`
| SORT `Normalised cost` DESC

attributes.title: Total Cost by Deployment Group

embeddableConfig.description: Full deployment bill: the sum of ALL billing SKUs (data tiers, ML, Kibana, snapshots, data transfer and on-prem nodes) converted at the configured rate. This is the highest-level total. Tier and data-stream panels show only the allocatable data-tier pool, so they sum to less than this figure.
embeddableConfig.title: Normalised Cost by Deployment Group

attributes.description: Cost breakdown per chargeback group split by FinOps category (data_tier, platform, transfer, snapshot, onprem). Total per group equals that group's full invoice amount. FinOps value: reveals whether a group's spend is dominated by compute (data_tier) or operational overhead (snapshots, egress transfer) — helps prioritise where optimisation conversations should start.

query.esql:
FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
  | EVAL `ts` = @timestamp
  | LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup
        ON
          `ts` >= conf_start_date AND
            `ts` <= conf_end_date
  | STATS
      `Normalised cost` =
        SUM(
          COALESCE(total_chargeable_units, total_ecu) *
            COALESCE(
              conf_chargeable_unit_rate,
              conf_ecu_rate,
              1.0))
        BY deployment_group, cost_category
  | RENAME deployment_group AS `Deployment Group`, cost_category as `Cost Category`
  | SORT `Normalised cost` DESC

FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
  | EVAL `ts` = @timestamp
  | LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup
        ON
          `ts` >= conf_start_date AND
            `ts` <= conf_end_date
  | STATS
      `Normalised cost` =
        SUM(
          COALESCE(total_chargeable_units, total_ecu) *
            COALESCE(
              conf_chargeable_unit_rate,
              conf_ecu_rate,
              1.0))
        BY deployment_group, cost_category
  | RENAME deployment_group AS `Deployment Group`, cost_category as `Cost Category`
  | SORT `Normalised cost` DESC

panelsJSON.title: Cost Share by Group and Category

embeddableConfig.content:
## Component statistics
**Source:** `billing_cluster_cost_lookup` — full invoice, filtered to SKUs with a classified `cost_type`.

Billing components (`cost_type`) are derived from the ESS SKU string: data tiers (datahot/datacontent, datawarm, datacold, datafrozen), platform (ml, kibana, apm), data-transfer, snapshots, and on-premises nodes. FinOps categories (`cost_category`) group these into broader buckets: data_tier, platform, transfer, snapshot, onprem, other.

⚠️ If any SKUs could not be classified (`cost_type IS NULL`), those rows are excluded — totals here may be slightly lower than the full bill above.

attributes.description: Cost per deployment broken down by billing component (cost_type: e.g. datahot/datacontent, datawarm, ml, kibana, snapshots, data-transfer) and FinOps category (cost_category: data_tier, platform, transfer, snapshot, onprem). Filtered to SKUs where cost_type has been classified — rows where classification could not be derived from the SKU are excluded. FinOps value: the most granular billing breakdown available — use this to identify which specific infrastructure components drive cost for each deployment.

query.esql:
FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
  | WHERE cost_type IS NOT NULL
  | EVAL `ts` = @timestamp, `Cost Category` = cost_category, `Cost Type` = cost_type,
      Deployment = deployment_name
  | LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup
        ON `ts` >= conf_start_date AND `ts` <= conf_end_date
  | STATS
      `Normalised cost` =
        SUM(
          COALESCE(total_chargeable_units, total_ecu) *
            COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0))
        BY Deployment, `Cost Category`, `Cost Type`
  | SORT `Normalised cost` DESC

FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
  | WHERE cost_type IS NOT NULL
  | EVAL `ts` = @timestamp, `Cost Category` = cost_category, `Cost Type` = cost_type,
      Deployment = deployment_name
  | LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup
        ON `ts` >= conf_start_date AND `ts` <= conf_end_date
  | STATS
      `Normalised cost` =
        SUM(
          COALESCE(total_chargeable_units, total_ecu) *
            COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0))
        BY Deployment, `Cost Category`, `Cost Type`
  | SORT `Normalised cost` DESC

attributes.title: Cost by Billing Component and Deployment

embeddableConfig.description: Full deployment bill: the sum of ALL billing SKUs (data tiers, ML, Kibana, snapshots, data transfer and on-prem nodes) converted at the configured rate. This is the highest-level total. Tier and data-stream panels show only the allocatable data-tier pool, so they sum to less than this figure.

panelsJSON.title: Cost by Billing Component and Deployment

attributes.description: Proportional cost split by FinOps category per deployment — shows how much of each deployment's bill comes from data storage (data_tier) vs. platform components (ML, Kibana, APM) vs. operational overhead (transfer, snapshot). FinOps value: the headline for optimisation conversations — a high transfer or snapshot share signals quick-win reduction opportunities.

query.esql:
FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| WHERE cost_type IS NOT NULL
| EVAL ts = @timestamp
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON ts >= conf_start_date AND ts <= conf_end_date
| STATS `Normalised cost` = SUM(COALESCE(total_chargeable_units, total_ecu) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0)) BY deployment_name, cost_category
| RENAME cost_category AS `Cost Category`, deployment_name AS `Deployment`
| SORT `Normalised cost` DESC

FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| WHERE cost_type IS NOT NULL
| EVAL ts = @timestamp
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON ts >= conf_start_date AND ts <= conf_end_date
| STATS `Normalised cost` = SUM(COALESCE(total_chargeable_units, total_ecu) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0)) BY deployment_name, cost_category
| RENAME cost_category AS `Cost Category`, deployment_name AS `Deployment`
| SORT `Normalised cost` DESC

attributes.title: Cost Share by FinOps Category

embeddableConfig.description:
Cost broken down by Deployment, and FinOps roll-up group (Cost category).
Cost category groups these into broader buckets (data_tier, platform, transfer, snapshot, onprem, other).
This is the highest-level total. Tier and data-stream panels show only the allocatable data-tier pool, so they sum to less than this figure.

attributes.description: Proportional cost split by billing component (cost_type) per deployment — the finest-grained view of what Elastic is invoicing. FinOps value: pinpoints exactly which SKU families dominate spend, e.g. whether cold-tier storage or data-transfer is the unexpected cost driver.

query.esql:
FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| WHERE cost_type IS NOT NULL
| EVAL ts = @timestamp
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON ts >= conf_start_date AND ts <= conf_end_date
| STATS `Normalised cost` = SUM(COALESCE(total_chargeable_units, total_ecu) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0)) BY deployment_name, cost_type
| RENAME cost_type AS `Cost Type`, deployment_name as `Deployment`
| SORT `Normalised cost` DESC

FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| WHERE cost_type IS NOT NULL
| EVAL ts = @timestamp
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON ts >= conf_start_date AND ts <= conf_end_date
| STATS `Normalised cost` = SUM(COALESCE(total_chargeable_units, total_ecu) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0)) BY deployment_name, cost_type
| RENAME cost_type AS `Cost Type`, deployment_name as `Deployment`
| SORT `Normalised cost` DESC

attributes.title: Cost Share by Billing Component

embeddableConfig.description:
Cost broken down by Deployment, and Billable component (Cost type).
Cost Type shows individual SKU families (datahot/datacontent, datawarm, ml, kibana, snapshots, …).

attributes.description: Estimated cost per deployment split by data tier (hot/content, warm, cold, frozen), calculated using the usage-based chargeable pool: provisioned data-tier ECU × utilization score, then allocated by workload share (indexing / querying / storage). ⚠️ This total is lower than the full deployment bill: it covers only allocatable data-tier SKUs and applies a utilization discount. ML, Kibana, snapshots, and data transfer are excluded. FinOps value: shows how data-tier capacity cost is distributed across tiers by actual workload — useful for ILM decisions and tier right-sizing.

query.esql:
FROM cluster_tier_contribution_lookup
| WHERE composite_key IS NOT NULL AND tier IS NOT NULL AND tier != "unknown"
| EVAL ts = @timestamp
| LOOKUP JOIN billing_realized_pool_lookup ON composite_key
| WHERE data_tier_capacity_ecu IS NOT NULL
| LOOKUP JOIN cluster_capacity_utilization_lookup ON composite_key
| LOOKUP JOIN cluster_deployment_contribution_lookup ON composite_key
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON ts >= conf_start_date AND ts <= conf_end_date
| EVAL deployment = CASE(deployment_id IS NULL, deployment_name, CONCAT(deployment_name, " (", LEFT(deployment_id, 6), ")"))
| EVAL mem_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_utilization_memory_weight), 70.0), disk_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_utilization_storage_weight), 30.0)
| EVAL heap_p = COALESCE(heap_used_pct_p95, 100) / 100, disk_p = COALESCE(disk_used_pct_p95, 100) / 100
| EVAL util_score = (mem_w * heap_p + disk_w * disk_p) / (mem_w + disk_w), chargeable_pool = data_tier_capacity_ecu * util_score, tier_label = CASE(tier IS NULL OR tier == "unknown", "Unclassified", tier)
| EVAL idx_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_indexing_weight), 20.0), qry_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_query_weight), 20.0), sto_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_storage_weight), 40.0), rate = COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0)
| EVAL indexing = CASE(deployment_sum_indexing_time > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_indexing_time) / deployment_sum_indexing_time * chargeable_pool), querying = CASE(deployment_sum_query_time > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_query_time) / deployment_sum_query_time * chargeable_pool), store = CASE(deployment_sum_store_size > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_store_size) / deployment_sum_store_size * chargeable_pool), data_set = CASE(deployment_sum_data_set_store_size > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_data_set_store_size) / deployment_sum_data_set_store_size * chargeable_pool)
| EVAL storage = CASE(store == 0, data_set, store), total_weight_hot = sto_w + qry_w + idx_w, total_weight_cold = sto_w + qry_w
| EVAL blended = CASE(tier_label == "hot/content", (storage * sto_w + querying * qry_w + indexing * idx_w) / total_weight_hot, (storage * sto_w + querying * qry_w) / total_weight_cold) * rate
| STATS `Normalised cost` = SUM(blended) BY deployment, tier_label
| WHERE deployment IS NOT NULL AND tier_label IS NOT NULL AND `Normalised cost` > 0
| RENAME tier_label AS `Data Tier`
| SORT `Normalised cost` DESC
| LIMIT 500

FROM cluster_tier_contribution_lookup
| WHERE composite_key IS NOT NULL AND tier IS NOT NULL AND tier != "unknown"
| EVAL ts = @timestamp
| LOOKUP JOIN billing_realized_pool_lookup ON composite_key
| WHERE data_tier_capacity_ecu IS NOT NULL
| LOOKUP JOIN cluster_capacity_utilization_lookup ON composite_key
| LOOKUP JOIN cluster_deployment_contribution_lookup ON composite_key
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON ts >= conf_start_date AND ts <= conf_end_date
| EVAL deployment = CASE(deployment_id IS NULL, deployment_name, CONCAT(deployment_name, " (", LEFT(deployment_id, 6), ")"))
| EVAL mem_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_utilization_memory_weight), 70.0), disk_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_utilization_storage_weight), 30.0)
| EVAL heap_p = COALESCE(heap_used_pct_p95, 100) / 100, disk_p = COALESCE(disk_used_pct_p95, 100) / 100
| EVAL util_score = (mem_w * heap_p + disk_w * disk_p) / (mem_w + disk_w), chargeable_pool = data_tier_capacity_ecu * util_score, tier_label = CASE(tier IS NULL OR tier == "unknown", "Unclassified", tier)
| EVAL idx_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_indexing_weight), 20.0), qry_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_query_weight), 20.0), sto_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_storage_weight), 40.0), rate = COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0)
| EVAL indexing = CASE(deployment_sum_indexing_time > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_indexing_time) / deployment_sum_indexing_time * chargeable_pool), querying = CASE(deployment_sum_query_time > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_query_time) / deployment_sum_query_time * chargeable_pool), store = CASE(deployment_sum_store_size > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_store_size) / deployment_sum_store_size * chargeable_pool), data_set = CASE(deployment_sum_data_set_store_size > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_data_set_store_size) / deployment_sum_data_set_store_size * chargeable_pool)
| EVAL storage = CASE(store == 0, data_set, store), total_weight_hot = sto_w + qry_w + idx_w, total_weight_cold = sto_w + qry_w
| EVAL blended = CASE(tier_label == "hot/content", (storage * sto_w + querying * qry_w + indexing * idx_w) / total_weight_hot, (storage * sto_w + querying * qry_w) / total_weight_cold) * rate
| STATS `Normalised cost` = SUM(blended) BY deployment, tier_label
| WHERE deployment IS NOT NULL AND tier_label IS NOT NULL AND `Normalised cost` > 0
| RENAME tier_label AS `Data Tier`
| SORT `Normalised cost` DESC
| LIMIT 500

attributes.title: Normalised cost per deployment and tier

embeddableConfig.description: The allocatable pool redistributed across data tiers by workload — a weighted blend of indexing, query and storage share. The total is slightly below the realised pool because deployment-days that have a billing pool but no monitoring breakdown cannot be allocated to a tier.
embeddableConfig.title: Normalised cost per deployment and tier

attributes.description: Percentage of each deployment's chargeable pool consumed by each data tier, based on actual workload (indexing time, query time, storage size). ⚠️ Denominator is the chargeable pool (allocatable data-tier ECU × utilization), not the full invoice — percentages do not apply to the total billing figures above. FinOps value: identifies which tier carries the heaviest workload share, guiding ILM policy and tier sizing decisions.

FROM cluster_tier_contribution_lookup

| EVAL heap_p = COALESCE(heap_used_pct_p95, 100) / 100, disk_p = COALESCE(disk_used_pct_p95, 100) / 100
| EVAL util_score = (mem_w * heap_p + disk_w * disk_p) / (mem_w + disk_w), chargeable_pool = data_tier_capacity_ecu * util_score, tier_label = CASE(tier IS NULL OR tier == "unknown", "Unclassified", tier)
| EVAL idx_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_indexing_weight), 20.0), qry_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_query_weight), 20.0), sto_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_storage_weight), 40.0), rate = COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0)
| EVAL indexing = CASE(deployment_sum_indexing_time > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_indexing_time) / deployment_sum_indexing_time * chargeable_pool), querying = CASE(deployment_sum_query_time > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_query_time) / deployment_sum_query_time * chargeable_pool), store = CASE(deployment_sum_store_size > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_store_size) / deployment_sum_store_size * chargeable_pool), data_set = CASE(deployment_sum_data_set_store_size > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_data_set_store_size) / deployment_sum_data_set_store_size * chargeable_pool)
| EVAL storage = CASE(store == 0, data_set, store), total_weight_hot = sto_w + qry_w + idx_w, total_weight_cold = sto_w + qry_w
| EVAL blended = CASE(tier_label == "hot/content", (storage * sto_w + querying * qry_w + indexing * idx_w) / total_weight_hot, (storage * sto_w + querying * qry_w) / total_weight_cold) * rate
| STATS `Normalised cost` = SUM(blended) BY deployment, tier_label
| WHERE deployment IS NOT NULL AND tier_label IS NOT NULL AND `Normalised cost` > 0
| RENAME tier_label AS `Data Tier`
| SORT `Normalised cost` DESC
| LIMIT 500

FROM cluster_tier_contribution_lookup
| WHERE composite_key IS NOT NULL AND tier IS NOT NULL AND tier != "unknown"
| EVAL ts = @timestamp
| LOOKUP JOIN billing_realized_pool_lookup ON composite_key
| WHERE data_tier_capacity_ecu IS NOT NULL

| EVAL util_score = (mem_w * heap_p + disk_w * disk_p) / (mem_w + disk_w), chargeable_pool = data_tier_capacity_ecu * util_score, tier_label = CASE(tier IS NULL OR tier == "unknown", "Unclassified", tier)
| EVAL idx_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_indexing_weight), 20.0), qry_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_query_weight), 20.0), sto_w = COALESCE(TO_DOUBLE(conf_storage_weight), 40.0), rate = COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0)
| EVAL indexing = CASE(deployment_sum_indexing_time > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_indexing_time) / deployment_sum_indexing_time * chargeable_pool), querying = CASE(deployment_sum_query_time > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_query_time) / deployment_sum_query_time * chargeable_pool), store = CASE(deployment_sum_store_size > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_store_size) / deployment_sum_store_size * chargeable_pool), data_set = CASE(deployment_sum_data_set_store_size > 0, TO_DOUBLE(tier_sum_data_set_store_size) / deployment_sum_data_set_store_size * chargeable_pool)
| EVAL storage = CASE(store == 0, data_set, store), total_weight_hot = sto_w + qry_w + idx_w, total_weight_cold = sto_w + qry_w
| EVAL blended = CASE(tier_label == "hot/content", (storage * sto_w + querying * qry_w + indexing * idx_w) / total_weight_hot, (storage * sto_w + querying * qry_w) / total_weight_cold) * rate
| STATS `Normalised cost` = SUM(blended) BY deployment, tier_label
| WHERE deployment IS NOT NULL AND tier_label IS NOT NULL AND `Normalised cost` > 0
| RENAME tier_label AS `Data Tier`
| SORT `Normalised cost` DESC
| LIMIT 500

attributes.title: Normalised cost share by deployment and tier

embeddableConfig.description: The allocatable pool redistributed across data tiers by workload — a weighted blend of indexing, query and storage share. The total is slightly below the realised pool because deployment-days that have a billing pool but no monitoring breakdown cannot be allocated to a tier.
embeddableConfig.title: Normalised cost share by deployment and tier

embeddableConfig.content:
## Deployment cost allocation (usage-based)
**Source:** `cluster_tier_contribution_lookup` — usage-based allocation, **not** the full invoice.

⚠️ **These totals will not match the billing figures above.** This section allocates the *chargeable pool* — allocatable data-tier ECU discounted by p95 utilization — across tiers by actual workload (indexing time, query time, storage). ML, Kibana, APM, snapshots, and data transfer are excluded. For the full usage-based breakdown see the *[Chargeback] Usage & Cost Allocation* dashboard.

attributes.title: [Chargeback] Billing Components Overview
